description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On March 2, 2026 at 4:17 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a collision 
involving an SUV towing a travel trailer on Newcomb Avenue near Toland Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling southwestbound on Toland Street when it turned left onto a narrow portion of Newcomb Avenue, with 
vehicles parked at the curb in both directions. After completing the left turn, the Waymo AV slowed to a stop facing southeast in-lane to 
yield to an SUV towing a travel trailer traveling northwestbound on Newcomb Avenue. The SUV proceeded to pass the Waymo AV on the 
left and began to turn right onto Toland Street, and the rear left side of the SUV’s travel trailer made contact with the rear left side of the 
stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. The Waymo AV 
sustained damage. 
 
Print
Clear Form
